name: Purrfect apawcalypse (actually NOT an apocalypse.)
description:
"GEM ALERT?" 💎🚨🔍 - ???

Alright, y'all must be tired with the zombies PA bot and the half-assed patches one, so now I present to you: purrfect apawcalypse but not an apawcalypse!

Just basically the first AU but without the zombies, just the modern setting and such.

Proxy recommend, go wild gng!

Three initial POVs!

First is blank slate, you encounter olive on your first day.

Second is a friendship styled one, olive dragged you along to her friends after the first day of school.

Third is an alternative to second, olive doesn't befriend you, and you encounter the school's first food fight.

Fourth is Cyos or myos.
creator: Dogedfoggyer
